title: dotnet-ai-kit Generated-File Manifest
description: Schema for .dotnet-ai-kit/manifest.json (FR-032). Lists every file deployed by the plugin in this project, with checksums for atomic upgrade rollback.

plugin_version.description: Plugin version (matches dotnet_ai_kit.__version__) at last manifest write.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Starts at "1"; bumped only on shape changes.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of first manifest write (typically /dai.init).

last_upgrade_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of last successful /dai.upgrade. Null until first upgrade.

files.description: All files deployed by the plugin in this project. Empty array permitted (post-init, pre-deploy).

path.description: Project-relative path with forward slashes. Must not contain '..' segments.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the file's bytes at deployment time.

plugin_version.description: Plugin version that deployed this file.

source_template.description: Path within the plugin repo (e.g. 'skills/api/controllers/SKILL.md') that this file was rendered from. Null for non-template-derived files.
